entries.title: Runtime authority
entries.content:
Decision: Runtime remains the authority over provider output.

Rationale: Provider output is untrusted and must pass runtime validation.

Alternatives:
- none

Consequences:
- none

entries.title: Project memory reader
entries.content:
Summary: ProjectMemoryReader converts safe memory into RuntimeContextSource.

Details:
- It does not execute anything.
- It only renders already-sanitized memory.

entries.title: No secrets in memory context
entries.content:
Rule: Memory context must never expose API keys or env secrets.

Reason: Runtime context can later be included in prompts.

Enforcement:
- none

knownFiles.summary: Reads sanitized project memory and renders context sources.
